title: Permutations
hints: Use backtracking/DFS approach to generate all permutations.
Swap elements at current index with elements at later indices.
Recursively generate permutations for the remaining positions.
After recursion, swap back to restore the original state (backtrack).
When you reach the last index, add the current permutation to the result.
Make sure to create a copy of the array before adding to result.
